name: Genfeed AI Agent
description: AI-powered content creation and publishing agent for generating videos, images, articles, and managing multi-platform social media publishing.

skills.name: Generate AI Image
skills.description: Generate AI images using multiple models including Flux, DALL-E, Imagen, and more.

skills.name: Generate AI Video
skills.description: Create AI videos with voice-over using models including Google Veo 3 and OpenAI Sora 2.

skills.name: Manage Content
skills.description: List, create, and manage AI-generated articles, posts, and media content.

skills.name: Publish to Social Platforms
skills.description: Publish or schedule content to 19+ platforms including YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, LinkedIn, X, Facebook, Pinterest, and Reddit.

skills.name: Execute Workflow
skills.description: Run deterministic AI content workflows with 44+ node types for fully automated pipelines.

skills.name: Manage AI Personas
skills.description: List and configure AI personas (avatars) for content creation.

skills.name: Batch Generate Content
skills.description: Generate and review multiple pieces of AI content in parallel.

skills.name: Chat with AI Agent
skills.description: Interact with Genfeed AI agents for assisted content creation.
